## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing outcome.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run eval:dry`

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots added for UI changes
- [ ] New tests added or existing coverage updated
- [ ] No tracked build artifacts or local test output included
